original_image_tags: The rest of the page is blank, showing only two punch holes at the top and some faint, illegible text showing through from the reverse side.

elements.description: A blue rubber stamp reading 'RECEIVED / Sep 26 4 56 P.M. / INTERNAL SECURITY / F.B.I. / ... OF JUTTIC...' (partially cut off). There is also a handwritten annotation in the bottom left corner.

judge.reason: Description B describes specific visual content (a blue stamp with quoted text and a handwritten annotation) while Description A states the page is blank with only punch holes and faint reverse text, indicating they are about entirely different visual content.
